channel.title: Comments on: Best Craft Beer Picks 2010, Ep. 122
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Kendra and Buddy Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Buddy Eggleton
item.description: Have a great New Year, thanks for all the selections, especially these picks.
item.content:encoded: Have a great New Year, thanks for all the selections, especially these picks.

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: Happy New Year. Both selections are a great choice.
item.content:encoded: Happy New Year. Both selections are a great choice.

item.title: By: Sean Inman
item.dc:creator: Sean Inman
item.description: Hop Czar is great but the 2010 Hop Harvest from Bridgeport is mind blowing.
item.content:encoded: Hop Czar is great but the 2010 Hop Harvest from Bridgeport is mind blowing.

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: That Hop Czar was a tasty beer!
item.content:encoded: That Hop Czar was a tasty beer!
